mastermind.comPage 2
Congratulations on joining the Mastermind Business System (MBS) program and taking this important step
toward building your knowledge-based business!
Get ready to get to work and see how small, consistent efforts compound dramatically. At the end of this
Jumpstart, you’ll have a solid foundation, some valuable new skills, and an unshakeable belief in yourself and the
value you can bring to your audience.
We’ve designed each step to take less than 30 minutes to watch the video lesson and complete the
assignment. Whether you commit to 30 minutes a day or want to complete it all in one sitting, just keep moving
forward at your own pace. The only way you fail is by quitting.
So here’s what you need to do:
1. 	Complete the Mastermind Business System assessment. This assessment will generate valuable
insights you’ll rely on as you move through the 7-Step Jumpstart and the larger MBS program. Log into
your Mastermind.com account, navigate to “Mastermind Business System” in the left-hand menu, and
start your assessment.
2. 	Complete your Mastermind Business Hub onboarding. We’ll be diving into different elements of
your Hub capabilities, so you’ll want to have the basic setup completed before we start. Log into your
Mastermind.com account, navigate to “Mastermind Business Hub” in the left-hand menu, and click “Start
Here!”
3. 	Join the Facebook group. Start making connections with the community right away!
Click here to join the group.
We know you’re going to get so much from this experience, both personally and professionally. Follow step-by-
step, and don’t let yourself get overwhelmed.
Finally, remember to have fun. If you get stuck or have any questions, email us at support@mastermind.com.
We’re excited to see what you do with your knowledge, skills, and experiences to create a massive impact in the
world.
Ready… set… JUMP!
Getting Ready
// 7-Step Jumpstart

The way to persist until you succeed is to attach your heart to what motivates you to create your business. The
Seven Layers Deep exercise is a powerful tool to help you connect to your heart and draw out the why behind
your motivation. Picture your compelling future. Why do you want this?

Certificate
Of Commitment
I,
hereby agree to successfully complete the Mastermind Business System program. Driven
by my desire to grow personally and professionally, and recognizing the transformational
potential of this opportunity, I vow to actively engage and participate in the program.
By signing this certificate of commitment, I acknowledge that MBS is designed to equip me
with the essential knowledge, skills, and tools to help enhance my abilities and achieve my
goals. I recognize that this program demands dedication, effort, and energy, and I am fully
prepared to invest the time, energy, and focus necessary to complete it.
I commit to:
• 	Actively participating in all components of the MBS curriculum, including watching videos,
completing assignments, and engaging in the community.
• 	Approaching the MBS program with an open mind, positive attitude, and growth mindset,
understanding that obstacles and setbacks present valuable opportunities for learning
and personal development.
• 	Implementing the concepts, strategies, and techniques learned in the MBS program in
my personal and professional life, and actively seeking opportunities to integrate and
practice these principles in real-world scenarios.
• 	I understand that the completion of the MBS program is not only an accomplishment
but also a testament to my dedication towards personal growth and development as a,
capable and confident person.
By signing and dating this certificate below, I reaffirm my unwavering commitment to
successfully complete the Mastermind Business System program, taking the next step in my
personal and professional journey.

Date:

// Step Four
Your lead magnet is a valuable piece of content that addresses a challenge your ideal client has. You offer it
in exchange for their email address. A lead magnet can be anything (a video, a checklist, an ebook), but we’re
going to focus on creating one of these three items:
Take notes here about your first lead magnet:
Resource Guide 	Checklist 	Short Report (“Top Three Myths About X”)
A checklist	A resource guide 	A short guide
that covers “The Three Myths About…”
Create Your Lead Magnet
Example: John is a course creator who helps urban gardeners raise their own vegetables in
small spaces.
// Lead Magnet 	// Topic
Checklist
Resource Guide
“The Three Biggest Myths About Starting Your Own Urban Garden”
“How to Maximize Sunlight in Your Urban Garden: A Complete Checklist”
“The Ultimate Guide to Choosing the Right Plants for Your Urban Garden”
Three Myths About X
// 01
// 02
// 03

Once you’ve created your Solution Statement (don’t stress about getting this perfect, you’ll continue to refine
this as you move forward through the MBS program), write it down here to refer to as you go through the
Mastermind Business System program:
Examples of powerful Solution Statements:
I’m a 	who helps 	to
with/without 	.
Example: “I’m a coach who helps new CPAs establish their own profitable agency without
getting stuck in red tape.”
Example: “I’m a mompreneur, who creates courses to teach moms of preschoolers how to be
an entrepreneur and a mom without feeling stressed and overwhelmed.”
Example: “I run a mastermind to help baseball card collectors connect with each other for
connection and community.”
Celebrate!
// Step 08 | Bonus
// Solution Statement = Your Ideal Audience + Problem You Solve + How You Solve it
Your Solution Statement is a short phrase that identifies who you are, what you do, who you help,
and how you help them.
Congratulations on not only writing your Solution Statement,
but completing your 7-Step Jumpstart! We’re so excited about
your new direction and want to celebrate with you. Click to
submit your Solution Statement here.
